vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thuần khiết, không bị pha tạp
vocab.example: I venture into the countryside to capture the unadulterated beauty of nature before it gets touched by urbanization.

vocab.meaning: sự suy tàn của đô thị (chụp các tòa nhà cũ nát, hoang phế)
vocab.example: I have a fascination with urban decay, so I often photograph abandoned factories and crumbling brick walls.
I love playing with a slow shutter speed to create a motion blur effect when photographing rushing waterfalls.

vocab.meaning: cốt truyện bằng hình ảnh/lối dẫn chuyện bằng hình
vocab.example: When I travel, I try to build a visual narrative through my photos rather than just taking disconnected shots.

vocab.meaning: độ sâu trường ảnh (khả năng làm mờ hậu cảnh)
vocab.example: I usually use a shallow depth of field for my portraits to ensure the subject pops against a blurred background.

vocab.meaning: nhiếp ảnh trong điều kiện thiếu sáng
vocab.example: I've been experimenting with low-light photography lately, trying to capture the mysterious vibe of the city at 2 AM.

vocab.meaning: đường dẫn (kỹ thuật bố cục dẫn mắt người xem)
vocab.example: I often look for leading lines, like a winding road or a fence, to draw the viewer's eye into the center of the image.

vocab.meaning: những tương tác tự nhiên, không diễn
vocab.example: My favorite part of a wedding is capturing candid interactions between the guests when they don't realize I'm there.

vocab.meaning: màu sắc rực rỡ, đậm nét
vocab.example: I'm drawn to tropical landscapes because of their saturated colors, especially the deep blues of the ocean.
Photography, for me, is all about freezing a fleeting moment that would otherwise be lost forever.
